prompt: {"task":"editorial website hero design reference v2 - operator architect, sharper authority","output":"single 16:9 horizontal image, photographic editorial quality, color-graded film still feel like Michael Clayton or The Insider, subtle 35mm grain, no watermark, no signature, no captions outside the composition","hard_constraints":["DO NOT use a conventional website hero layout","NO left-text / right-image split","NO centered headline + subhead + two buttons","NO gradient blobs, glowing nodes, neon-on-black, holographic gradients, abstract orbs, Powered by GPT badges, agentic decoration, futuristic sci-fi panel HUDs, neural-network illustrations, robotic hands, brain icons","NO Accenture/Deloitte stock-photo grid look, no four-quadrant framework, no handshake imagery, no team-pointing-at-screens","NO printed spreadsheet rows of numbers - the document on the desk MUST read as a hand-drawn system architecture, not a finance report","Treat this like a film still from a senior-operator drama. Less office, more strategy room."],"business_context":{"brand":"PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS","category":"An AI Solutions Practice. Operator-led AI agents and automations for 10-100 person operations","audience":"SMB owners and operators past the should-we-use-AI phase; they evaluate vendors by whether the person sounds like they have run an operation","voice":"Bold. Declarative. Premium. Short sentences. Concrete nouns. Banned: transform, unlock, leverage, synergy, next-generation, cutting-edge."},"composition":{"layout":"asymmetric editorial. Subject crop anchored lower-left third. Upper-right two-thirds is quiet negative space where the headline lives. Reads as one photograph, not a layout.","focal_point":"A man's hand and forearm in a rolled-cuff white oxford shirt, mid-motion with a black fine-tip fountain pen, marking up a HAND-DRAWN OPERATING-SYSTEM MAP on heavy cream A3 paper. The map shows: boxes connected by clean black-ink arrows, three labeled swimlanes running horizontally, a handful of nodes with handwritten labels like 'INTAKE', 'TRIAGE', 'AGENT', 'REVIEW', 'OUTPUT'. ONE node is aggressively circled twice in heavier ink with a handwritten 'NO' next to it. ONE box is crossed through with two firm diagonal pen strokes. ONE arrow has been re-routed with an arc over an old line. The page has a single dog-eared folded corner at the upper-right of the paper. The pen is mid-stroke drawing a fresh arrow. Beside the paper: a closed matte-black 14-inch laptop, a small ceramic mug of black coffee with a faint coffee ring stain on the wood, a stack of two heavy leather-bound notebooks (one open with handwritten notes barely visible). No face, no head.","camera":"35mm-equivalent at f/2.8, slight three-quarter overhead angle from camera-left, shallow depth of field, anamorphic compression, focus pinned to the pen tip and the inked-arrow detail on the paper","lighting":"late golden hour, hard directional window light raking from camera-left at low angle, deeper shadow falloff to the right, warm 4000K, light catches the cuff edge, the paper texture, and the curl of the dog-eared corner. Chiaroscuro stronger than typical office shot.","setting":"spare ink-toned strategy room. Plain plaster wall in the background tinted deep navy. No art, no plants, no shelving, no decor. The room is empty because the operator is the only one in it.","negative_space":"upper-right two-thirds intentionally simple - the dark plaster wall holds a soft shadow gradient from upper-right (darkest) to lower-left - left empty for the headline"},"ux_elements_to_render_inside_the_image":{"top_left_wordmark":"text reading 'PERSEID ECHO CREATIONS' in small all-caps Poppins SemiBold, letter-spacing 0.20em, in paper-white #F6F6F4 at 12px optical size, top-left margin","top_right_nav":"four small nav items in matching small caps Poppins SemiBold, paper-white #F6F6F4 at 70 percent opacity, reading exactly: 'APPROACH   SERVICES   ABOUT   CONTACT'","headline":"large Poppins SemiBold, tight tracking at -0.03em, three short lines left-aligned within a right-anchored block, in paper-white #F6F6F4. Exact copy, three lines: line 1 'Built.' line 2 'Not pitched.' line 3 'Not promised.' - periods exactly as written, no em dashes","accent_move":"a single 4px-thick persimmon #FF6A2A horizontal underline of exactly 60px length sitting directly under the third line, flush left to the headline block. ONLY chromatic-pop move in the frame.","meta_line":"directly below the underline, small caps Poppins Medium in paper-white #F6F6F4 at 60 percent opacity, reading exactly: 'AN AI SOLUTIONS PRACTICE / EST. 2026'","cta":"a single ghost button positioned lower-right of the frame: 1px paper-white #F6F6F4 stroke at 42 percent opacity, no fill, 13px label reading exactly 'Start a Conversation', with a small right-pointing arrow glyph at the end","corner_index":"bottom-left tiny caps Poppins Medium at 50 percent opacity reading exactly: 'INDEX / 01 / PRACTICE'"},"palette":{"dominant":"deep navy ink #0D1321 plaster wall, warm sepia cream paper, white shirt cuff, black coffee, matte-black laptop, leather book browns","primary_text_color":"#F6F6F4 paper-white","accent":"#FF6A2A persimmon used ONCE only, as the small underline beneath the third headline line. Approx 1 percent of pixels.","forbidden":"no teal, no green, no blue saturation above navy ink, no second orange, no pastels"},"typography_direction":{"display":"Poppins SemiBold, geometric sans, tight tracking, operator-grade","meta":"Poppins Medium small caps with wide letter-spacing for tags and index marker"},"surface_treatment":"subtle 35mm film grain at 7 percent, slight vignette darker upper-right corner, deeper black levels than a standard editorial shot, no chromatic aberration, no lens flare","forbid_in_image":["any text on the page that reads as columns of numbers (no spreadsheet)","any printed corporate report look (no Excel grid, no PowerPoint chart, no PDF letterhead)","any text not explicitly listed above outside the operator's handwritten map","any human face or head","any logo or brand visible on objects in scene","any decor not specified (no plants, no books on shelves, no posters, no clocks)","any abstract decorative element (orbs, lines, particles, blobs, nodes-glow, gradients)","any second accent color besides the single persimmon underline","any screen content on the laptop (laptop is closed)","any robotic, AI, futuristic, holographic, or sci-fi element"]}
